name: Japanese Fruit Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the melted margarine into the beaten eggs.
2. Add the sugar to the egg mixture and stir until combined.
3. Mix in the cider vinegar.
4. Fold in the raisins, pecans, and coconut.
5. Pour the filling into the prepared pie shell.
6. Bake at 325°F for 40 minutes.
